test.name: Marriage record — index title pairs the subject with a PARENT, not the spouse
test.description: Regression guard derived from the benny-taylor-spouse e2e fixture. A 1962 Oregon marriage record's index title reads 'Entry for Benny Rapheal Taylor and Tossie Bain' — but the record body shows 'Tossie Bain' is the GROOM'S MOTHER (a garbled transcription of Autossie 'Tossie' Bair), while the actual bride is Rosemarie Graham. The extractor must read the record's structured roles, not the misleading index title: the marriage/couple is Benny + Rosemarie Graham, and 'Tossie Bain' is a parent of the groom, never the bride. Guards against attaching an index-title-paired parent as a spouse (a namespace trap amplified when that parent is already the subject's mother in the tree).

input.user_message:
Extract assertions from this marriage record. The subject is Benny Rapheal Taylor (b. 1921).

Oregon, Marriage Records, 1906-1968
Index entry title: "Entry for Benny Rapheal Taylor and Tossie Bain, 28 Sep 1962"

Record detail:
Groom: Benny Rapheal Taylor
  Age: 41 (birth year 1921)
  Groom's father: Silvester Jay Taylor
  Groom's mother: Tossie Bain
Bride: Rosemarie Graham
  Age: 20 (birth year 1942)
  Birthplace: Portland, Oregon
  Bride's father: Arthur L Graham
  Bride's mother: Rosamund Hoover
Date of marriage: 28 September 1962
Place of marriage: Oregon, United States

judge_context: The marriage recorded here is between the groom Benny Rapheal Taylor and the bride Rosemarie Graham. Any assertion or relationship that treats 'Tossie Bain' as Benny's spouse/bride is WRONG.

The index entry title ('Benny Rapheal Taylor and Tossie Bain') is a misleading transcription artifact: the record body shows 'Tossie Bain' is the GROOM'S MOTHER, not the bride. The extractor must use the record's structured roles, not the index title, to assign relationships.
'Tossie Bain' should be extracted as the groom's mother (a parent role). It is a garbled form of Autossie 'Tossie' Bair; recognizing it as the mother — not a new spouse — is the point of this record.
The marriage date (28 Sep 1962) and place (Oregon), and the parties' names, ages, and parents are DIRECT evidence — explicitly stated on the record.
The bride's birth year (~1942) computed from her stated age is INDIRECT evidence.
A correct extraction produces a Couple/marriage between Benny Rapheal Taylor and Rosemarie Graham; it must NOT produce a marriage or couple relationship between Benny and Tossie Bain.
